DISCOVERY 610, MATTER WAS ARGUED. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT LAP WONG'S MOTION TO RE-OPEN DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. DISCOVERY IS RE-OPENED FOR THE PURPOSE OF CONDUCTING THE DEPOSITIONS OF OFFICER RIST, SUMNER BROWN, AND KIRSTI NEELY. THE PARTIES SHALL MEET AND CONFER AS TO SCHEDULING THE DEPOSITIONS AT MUTUALLY CONVENIENT TIMES IN ADVANCE OF THE ARBITRATION. PARTIES AGREE TO EXTEND DEADLINE FOR ARBITRATION BY THIRTY(30) DAYS. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Off Calendar Feb-07-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
TREVA STEWART, ESQ. OF THE NARAYAN FIRM, (650) 403-0150, FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY, LAP KONG WONG
ROBERT B. SCAPA, ESQ.(APPEARED TELEPHONICALLY) FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY

MATTER WAS ARGUED. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Lap Wong's motion to re-open discovery is granted. Discovery is re-opened for the purpose of conducting the depositions of Officer Rist, Sumner Brown, and Kirsti Neely. The parties shall meet and confer as to scheduling the depositions at mutually convenient times in advance of the arbitration. PARTIES AGREE TO EXTEND DEADLINE FOR ARBITRATION BY THIRTY(30) DAYS. (610/BEC) COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
